checks.question: Does each main claim map to a figure, table, or validated citation?
Do figure and table fact sheets match the planned claims and rendered artifacts?
Do the current assets satisfy the chosen venue profile and section requirements?
Does every drafted claim have a claim packet with display evidence, fact statements, and visible citation status?
Does every major manuscript section have a drafting brief with scope, evidence context, and visible readiness?
Does every major manuscript section have a drafting scaffold that can be turned into prose without inventing unsupported claims?
Does every major manuscript section have editable generated prose that remains aligned with the current drafting scaffolds?
Do managed prose blocks in canonical manuscript sections point to the current generated section bodies without overwriting freeform content?
